patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/452

## Problem
`pm plan materialize --materialize-type <T>` dead-ends when type T has a --required-on-create custom field: materialize has no way to pass custom-field values, fails missing_required_option per step. Any governed schema (required acceptance_owner etc.) breaks the plan -> materialize -> task loop; workaround defeats typed materialization.

## Proposed fix
Let materialize supply custom-field values (--field key=value per step or plan-level defaults), and/or let required-on-create policies exempt system-driven creates with an explicit policy knob. Prefer explicit --field passthrough (keeps governance intact).

## Definition of done
Materialize succeeds for types with required-on-create custom fields via documented passthrough; spec covers required-field + materialize interplay; docs plan section updated.
GH-452: plan materialize dead-ends on types with required-on-create custom fields

Dogfood GH-452: a --required-on-create custom field on a type breaks pm plan materialize for every step (missing_required_option, no passthrough) — the plan->materialize->task loop dead-ends under governed schemas. Duplicate check: searched materialize required field — no existing item.
plan materialize can supply required custom-field values (documented passthrough) and succeeds for governed types; spec covers required-field x materialize interplay; docs updated

author: codex-root
message: Start broad SDK-first plan workflow implementation; bundled because typed plan primitives and governed materialization share src/cli/commands/plan.ts, SDK runtime contracts, and plan regression coverage. All-status duplicate search completed; existing closed lineage remains closed.

value.text: Evidence: plan materialize accepts repeatable --field name=value, normalizes schema option keys, and forwards them through runCreate so required-on-create governance remains enforced. SDK regression creates required Task field acceptance_owner, materializes through PmClient, and verifies persisted value. Packed installed-package proof passed.

patch.value: Implemented governed materialization field passthrough with SDK and packed-package proof.
